params.description: The number of days of data to fetch as an offset from input date (e.g. "-7d" or "7d") or use "latest" to query for latest alerts for each repo

params.name: startAfterCursor
params.description: The pagination cursor that was returned as the "endCursor" property in previous request

items.docs:
List historical alerts.

This endpoint consumes 10 units of your quota.

This endpoint requires the following org token scopes:
- historical:alerts-list

params.name: org_slug

params.name: aggregation.fields

List latest alerts.

- alerts:list

info.name: List full scans associated with alert (Beta)

params.name: org_slug
params.description: The slug of the organization

params.name: per_page
params.description: Specify the maximum number of items to return per page (intermediate pages may have fewer than this limit and callers should always check "endCursor" in response body to know if there are more pages)

params.name: startAfterCursor
params.description: The pagination cursor that was returned as the "endCursor" property in previous request

params.name: alertKey
params.description: One or more alert keys for which to find associated full scans

params.name: range
params.description: The number of days of data to fetch as an offset from current date (e.g. "-7d" for past 7 days)
